strategy: Attack with Ice; it takes +30% and the card resists Fire 57%, everything else 27%. It is not stunable.
Round 1 it lays a protected DoT on each wizard (206,000 over 100 rounds, roughly 2,000 per round) and hands each of you a special Triage to remove it.
Cast that provided Triage early to clear the DoT, since a normal Triage cannot remove a protected DoT.
After the DoT is handled it is a straight race: stack Ice blades and end its 14,485 health with one big hit before the DoT wears you down.
If you can burst it fast, you can skip the Triage and simply out-damage it, but clearing the DoT is the safer line.
cheatNotes: Round 1 it casts a protected DoT on each wizard (206,000 over 100 rounds, about 2,000 per round) and hands each of you a special Triage to remove it. Cast that Triage early or the DoT grinds you down.
You do not have to cast the provided Triage to win. If you out-race the DoT you can ignore it, but casting it is the safe play.
